1996June 9, 1996

🇯🇵 Kobe, Japan

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Kobe, Japan, June 9, 1996 -- June 19, 1996

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1996-06-kobe-japan

34 Resolutions

289Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders and/or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |ISO Project |Project Lead |Document Editor |10303-45 |Joseph Carpenter |Robert Swindel...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
288Plenary
Authorize preparatory work on an EXPRESS mapping language
SC 4 authorises preparatory (Stage 0) work on an EXPRESS mapping language and assigns Martin Hardwick as project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
287Plenary
Direct WG 10 to investigate the use of fully attributed EXPRESS ARMs
SC 4 directs WG 10 to investigate the use of fully attributed EXPRESS ARMs and report to SC 4 at its next meeting.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
286Plenary
Define publication rules for Application Interpreted Constructs
SC 4 resolves that - an AIC shall be published as a separate part (500-series document) - APs shall reference AICs only as a normative reference - AICs shall be at the same or advanced voting statu...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
285Plenary
Invite nominations and establish liaisons with various committees
SC 4 requests its secretariat to circulate a letter to P-members inviting nominations for each of the following liaisons: JTC 1/SC 21/WG 3, JTC 1/SC 21/WG 7, JTC 1/SC 21/WG 11, JTC 1/SC 24, ISO/TC ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
284Plenary
Support Harmonisation Group with IEC on electrotechnical product data
SC 4: - welcomes the efforts by the Advisory Committee on Electronics and Telecommunications (ACET) to coordinate relevant activities across IEC - recognises the strong industrial demand for integr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
283Plenary
Nominate delegates for workshop on information models
SC 4 recognises the importance of the planned workshop on standards for the use of models that define the data and processes of information, and nominates the following delegates: - Guy Pierra to r...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
282Plenary
Accept request for a Category A liaison from NATO
SC 4 accepts the request for an A-liaison from NATO and requests its Secretariat to assist the NATO CALS Office to establish the liaison through the normal procedures.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
281Plenary
Request IEC/TC 93 to designate a liaison on electronic design automation
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 requests IEC/TC 93 to designate a liaison on electronic design automation to JWG 9 who can participate in the planning and technical meetings of JWG 9.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
280Plenary
Appoint JWG 9 Convener as participating liaison to IEC/TC 93
SC 4 appoints the JWG 9 Convener, Shaun Devlin, as a participating liaison to IEC/TC 93.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
279Plenary
Recommend internet capability for all P-members and A-liaisons
SC 4 strongly recommends that all P-members and A-liaisons have internet capability to send and receive ISO/TC 184/SC 4 documents by 1997-06-01.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
278Plenary
Require Abstract Test Suites to be advanced as Type 2 Technical Reports
The development of ATS is of the utmost importance in accelerating the availability of high quality commercial AP implementations. So that information and experience of ATS usage in practice may be...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
276Plenary
Appoint David Price as Deputy Convener of WG 11 and create ad-hoc group
SC 4 appoints David Price as Deputy Convener of WG 11, "EXPRESS Language, Implementation Methods, and Conformance Methods".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
275Plenary
Appoint Christophe Viel as Convener of WG 11
SC 4 appoints Christophe Viel as Convener of WG 11, "EXPRESS Language, Implementation Methods, and Conformance Methods".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
274Plenary
Appoint Allison Barnard Feeney as Convener of Quality Committee
SC 4 appoints Allison Barnard Feeney as Convener of the Quality Committee.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
273Plenary
Appoint Jean-Jacques Michel as convener of WG 8
SC 4 appoints Mr. Jean-Jacques Michel as convener of WG 8, Manufacturing Management Data.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
272Plenary
Establish new Working Group 12 for SC 4 Common Resources
SC 4 resolves to establish a new Working Group 12, SC 4 Common Resources. Responsibility for the Application Interpreted Constructs is assigned to this working Group. The Secretariat shall act as t...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
271Plenary
Publish methods documents as SC 4 standing documents
SC 4 methods documents from SC 4 working groups and committees will be published as SC 4 standing documents which will provide methods and procedures for SC 4 to carry out its standards development...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
270Plenary
Establish Change Management Advisory function
SC 4 resolves to establish a Change Management Advisory function.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
269Plenary
Approve changes to the SC 4 Organisation Handbook
SC 4 approves the changes to the SC 4 Organisation Handbook, SC 4 N445, and requests the SC 4 Secretariat take appropriate action to publish and disseminate the revised Handbook. Any further change...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
268Plenary
Accept guidelines for SC 4 meeting fees as found in SC 4 N438
SC 4 accepts ISO/TC 184/SC 4 N438 as the prescribed guidelines when assessing fees for SC 4-related meetings, and requests the SC 4 Secretary forward these guidelines to ISO for the Secretary-Gener...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
267Plenary
Require electronic format for ballot comments and SC 4 correspondence
SC 4 requires that, unless a P-member expressly requests in writing an exemption from the SC 4 Secretary, all ballot comments shall be provided in, at minimum, ASCII format along with a backup hard...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
265Plenary
Approve publication of 10303-12 as a Technical Report Type II
SC 4 approves the publication of 10303-12 as a Technical Report Type II and requests the SC 4 Secretariat take appropriate action for its publication and dissemination.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
264Plenary
Cancel project 10303-516 for mechanical design context
SC 4 agrees to cancel project #132, 10303-516, "Application interpreted construct: Mechanical design context" as recommended by NWI/CD ballot comments.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
263Plenary
Cancel project 10303-102 for ship structures due to lack of activity
SC 4 agrees to cancel project #27, 10303-102, "Integrated application resources: Ship structures" due to lack of activity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
262Plenary
Approve 10303-225 for Draft International Standard registration
SC 4 approves forwarding 10303-225 for Draft International Standard registration upon meeting all requirements established by the ISO Directives and other SC 4 resolutions.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
261Plenary
Approve project leaders and endorse editors as in SC 4 N439
SC 4 approves the list of project leaders and endorses the list of editors for the SC 4 work effort as found in SC 4 N439.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
260Plenary
Accept resignations of Yuhwei Yang, Sheila Lewis, and Albert Colin
SC 4 accepts with regret the resignation of Yuhwei Yang, Sheila Lewis, and Albert Colin as Convener of WG 4, WG 6, and WG 8 respectively.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
259Plenary
Process editorial SEDS reports and incorporate into ISO 10303
SC 4 requests the SC 4 Secretariat ensure these reports are made publicly available on SOLIS, and incorporated into technical corrigenda, amendments, or new editions when appropriate.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
258Plenary
Process technical SEDS reports and incorporate into ISO 10303
SC 4 requests the SC 4 Secretariat ensure these reports are made publicly available on SOLIS, and incorporated into technical corrigenda, amendments, or new editions when appropriate.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
257Plenary
Reconfirm resolution 168 and exempt specific projects from ATS requirements
SC 4 reconfirms resolution #168 but approves exempting 10303-210, 10303-224, and 10303-225 from the associated abstract test suite requirements of SC 4 Resolution #168 for these APs’ initial DIS re...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 recognises and supports the efforts of the STEP implementors to collaborate on implementation issues, and encourages the implementors to continue to hold meetings in parallel to SC 4 Working G...

Acclamation
Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
